item.name: Dainsleif F1
item.description:
Does not form the head. Or any other part of the body, for that matter.

Use item to acquire the Dáinsleif F1 minion.
item.tooltip:
They're fierce carnivores, who
see steel-clad knights as nothing
more than a packed lunch.
   - Alexondre
item.specialactiondescription: Reduces HP of enemy Search Eye by 90%. No effect if Search Eye is already inoperable.
